_meta.note: Replace with real data via: python scripts/capture_fixture.py <owner/repo> <pr_number>

pr.title: feat: add arxiv paper fetcher
pr.body:
Adds a module to fetch paper metadata from the arXiv API given a list of paper IDs.

## Changes
- `src/papertriage/fetcher.py`: ArxivFetcher class
- `tests/test_fetcher.py`: basic unit tests

Closes #3

raw_diff:
diff --git a/src/papertriage/fetcher.py b/src/papertriage/fetcher.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..abc1234
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/papertriage/fetcher.py
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import httpx
+
+class ArxivFetcher:
+    BASE = "https://export.arxiv.org/abs/"
+
+    def fetch(self, paper_id: str) -> dict:
+        resp = httpx.get(self.BASE + paper_id)
+        resp.raise_for_status()
+        return {"id": paper_id, "raw": resp.text}
